task_description: Build a landing page for a coffee shop with online ordering

mocked_dependencies.name: auth.requireAuth
mocked_dependencies.real_type: Express middleware — validates JWT session cookie against sessions table
mocked_dependencies.impact: All HTML-protected routes accept requests without a valid session cookie

mocked_dependencies.name: auth.requireApiAuth
mocked_dependencies.real_type: Express middleware — validates JWT session cookie, returns 401 JSON on failure
mocked_dependencies.impact: All API-protected routes accept requests without a valid session cookie

mocked_dependencies.name: auth.makeRequireAuth
mocked_dependencies.mock_value: Factory returns mock bypass middleware regardless of pool argument
mocked_dependencies.impact: server.js can call makeRequireAuth(pool) and get mock middleware back

mocked_dependencies.name: auth.makeRequireApiAuth
mocked_dependencies.real_type: Factory — produces pool-aware API session-validation middleware
mocked_dependencies.mock_value: Factory returns mock bypass middleware regardless of pool argument
mocked_dependencies.impact: server.js can call makeRequireApiAuth(pool) and get mock middleware back

mocked_dependencies.name: auth.sendMagicLinkEmail
mocked_dependencies.real_type: HTTP call to Postmark REST API (api.postmark.com) — sends magic link email
mocked_dependencies.mock_value: No-op logger — logs payload to console, returns { MessageID: "mock-msg-001", sent: true }
mocked_dependencies.impact: Zero network calls to Postmark. Magic link tokens are generated but not delivered.

mocked_dependencies.name: POSTMARK_SERVER_TOKEN
mocked_dependencies.real_type: Postmark API key — required for email delivery
mocked_dependencies.impact: Injected at startup if not already set. No real API calls made.

mocked_dependencies.name: PostgreSQL (Neon)
mocked_dependencies.real_type: Live Neon DB — stores pipeline_runs, pipeline_events, api_keys
mocked_dependencies.mock_value: MockPool — in-memory state machine matching real schema
mocked_dependencies.impact: All queries intercepted in-memory; real persistence not verified in this run

auth.requireAuth.real_type: Express middleware — validates JWT session cookie against sessions table
auth.requireAuth.impact: All HTML-protected routes accept requests without a valid session cookie

auth.requireApiAuth.real_type: Express middleware — validates JWT session cookie, returns 401 JSON on failure
auth.requireApiAuth.impact: All API-protected routes accept requests without a valid session cookie

auth.makeRequireAuth.mock_value: Factory returns mock bypass middleware regardless of pool argument
auth.makeRequireAuth.impact: server.js can call makeRequireAuth(pool) and get mock middleware back

auth.makeRequireApiAuth.real_type: Factory — produces pool-aware API session-validation middleware
auth.makeRequireApiAuth.mock_value: Factory returns mock bypass middleware regardless of pool argument
auth.makeRequireApiAuth.impact: server.js can call makeRequireApiAuth(pool) and get mock middleware back

auth.sendMagicLinkEmail.real_type: HTTP call to Postmark REST API (api.postmark.com) — sends magic link email
auth.sendMagicLinkEmail.mock_value: No-op logger — logs payload to console, returns { MessageID: "mock-msg-001", sent: true }
auth.sendMagicLinkEmail.impact: Zero network calls to Postmark. Magic link tokens are generated but not delivered.

POSTMARK_SERVER_TOKEN.real_type: Postmark API key — required for email delivery
POSTMARK_SERVER_TOKEN.impact: Injected at startup if not already set. No real API calls made.

mock_environment.db_mode_note: Sandbox/CI environment: real DB unreachable. MockPool provides identical pipeline behavior without network.

body.task_description: Build a landing page for a coffee shop with online ordering

warnings: DEAD_BUTTONS_DETECTED: Found 1 interactive elements (buttons, forms, nav) but only 0 event handlers in JS. 100% of interactive elements have no wired behavior.

memory_items_table.note: Schema exists (migration 007); not written by current pipeline — future semantic layer

artifacts_table.note: Schema exists (migration 007); pipeline uses ArtifactStore (filesystem) — future DB storage

artifact_versions_table.note: Schema exists (migration 007); not written by current pipeline

architecture_notes: pipeline_runs = primary run record (NOT migration-007 "runs" table)
pipeline_events = phase event log (NOT migration-007 "run_events" table)
memory_items / artifacts / artifact_versions = migration-007 future infra, not yet written by pipeline
Auth mock: requireAuth + requireApiAuth + makeRequireAuth + makeRequireApiAuth all bypassed via mock/mock-layer.js
Postmark mock: sendMagicLinkEmail no-op, zero network calls
A2A auth: REAL api_keys DB lookup — verified full auth path
DB: MOCK_DB — MockPool (sandbox — no outbound DB access)
